items.title: Argentina boss Scaloni leaves press conference in tears
items.summary: Argentina manager Lionel Scaloni leaves his post-match news conference in tears when talking about his future after Sunday's World Cup final defeat by Spain.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Teen dies during Spain World Cup celebrations: local authorities
items.summary: What should have been a celebration of Spain's team in the football World Cup turned into tragedy, said the municipality of of Ciudad Rodrigo in a Facebook post
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: 'No noise, no fun' - Rohit shrugs off retirement chatter after Lord's 138
items.summary: "There's not been any discussion like that in the team," Shubman Gill says when asked about Rohit Sharma's international future
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
